title: Always review a saved plan before applying
description: Generate an explicit plan file, read it for destroys and replacements, and apply only that artifact rather than re-planning at apply time.
body: Use when making any change to managed infrastructure. Do not run a bare terraform apply that auto-approves, and do not assume the diff at apply matches the diff you reviewed. Actions: run terraform plan -out=plan.tfbin, inspect the summary for create/update/destroy/replace counts, scrutinize every '-/+' replacement and every destroy, then apply the saved file so what you reviewed is exactly what executes. Validation signals include a plan with zero unexpected destroys and an apply that matches the saved plan. Risk boundary: any plan showing resource destruction or replacement of stateful infrastructure must be escalated for human approval before apply.
